KF Left Near Deku Gossip Stone.message: They say that Zora's Domain is on the way of the hero.

KF Right Near Deku Gossip Stone.message: They say that a Gold Skulltula Token can be found at the Lost Woods.

KF Storms Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that the treasure thrown by Princess Zelda is a Recovery Heart.

LW Gossip Stone.message: They say that shooting a target in the woods grants Saria's Song.

LW Near Shortcuts Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that night in the future reveals a spider in a valley holding a Piece of Heart.

SFM Near LW Gossip Stone.message: Here's a hint, @. Don't be bad.

SFM Center Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Market is on the way of the hero.

SFM Near Saria Gossip Stone.message: They say this hint makes more sense in other languages.

HF Cow Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Shadow Trial was dispelled by Sheik.

HF Near Market Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Shadow Temple hoards a Gold Skulltula Token.
HF Near Market Grotto Gossip Stone.location: Shadow Temple GS Single Giant Pot

HF Open Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Ice Cavern is on the way of the hero.
HF Open Grotto Gossip Stone.location: Ice Cavern GS Push Block Room

HF Southeast Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Biggoron Sword can be found at Zora's Fountain.

Market Left Center Gossip Stone.message: They say that the frozen cavern echoes with a Purple Rupee.

Market Leftmost Center Gossip Stone.message: They say that Gerudo Valley is on the way of the hero.

Market Right Center Gossip Stone.message: They say that plundering Temple of Time is a foolish choice.

Market Rightmost Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Ocarina of Time teaches a Red Rupee.

HC Near Malon Gossip Stone.message: When all else fails, use Fire.

HC Rock Wall Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Prelude of Light can be found at the Market.

HC Storm Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that a ravaged village mourns with an Overworld Key.

Kak Open Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say the longer the Goron's neck, the wiser they are.

Graveyard Gossip Stone.message: They say that spinning Goron pottery contains a Bomb Bag.

DMT Gossip Stone.message: They say that Spirit Temple is on the way of the hero.

DMT Storms Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that a Red Rupee can be found at Haunted Wasteland.

GC Maze Gossip Stone.message: They say that Jabu-Jabu's Belly hoards a Red Rupee.

GC Medigoron Gossip Stone.message: They say that deep in a castle, Impa teaches a Gold Skulltula Token.

DMC Gossip Stone.message: They say that Jabu-Jabu's Belly hoards a Piece of Heart.
DMC Gossip Stone.location: Jabu Jabus Belly GS Lobby Basement Lower

DMC Upper Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that Biggoron crafts a Gold Skulltula Token.

ZR Near Domain Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Stone of Agony can be found at Zora's River.

ZR Near Grottos Gossip Stone.message: They say that Deku Tree is on the way of the hero.

ZR Open Grotto Gossip Stone.message: They say that plundering outside Ganon's Castle is a foolish choice.

ZD Gossip Stone.message: They say that Spirit Temple hoards a Gold Skulltula Token.

ZF Near Jabu Gossip Stone.message: They say this ship is what all true gamers strive for.

ZF Near Fairy Gossip Stone.message: They say that an Overworld Key can be found at Goron City.

LH Near Lab Gossip Stone.message: They say that Spirit Temple hoards a Goron Tunic.
LH Near Lab Gossip Stone.location: Spirit Temple GS Hall After Sun Block Room

LH Southeast Gossip Stone.message: They say that fire in the Water Temple reveals a Fairy Bow.

LH Southwest Gossip Stone.message: They say that the Water Trial was dispelled by Sheik.

Gerudo Valley Gossip Stone.message: They say that it's actually possible to beat the running man.

Desert Colossus Gossip Stone.message: They say that a Piece of Heart can be found at Death Mountain Crater.

Dodongo's Cavern Gossip Stone.message: They say that Forest Temple hoards the Mirror Shield.
Dodongo's Cavern Gossip Stone.location: Forest Temple GS Level Island Courtyard

messages: Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me by reflecting my lightning bolts and unleashing the arrows from Kakariko Village!
Ha ha ha... You'll never defeat me, drop a castle on me and finish me off with the sacred blade from Shadow Temple!
Ha ha ha... You'll never beat me by reflecting my lightning bolts and unleashing the arrows from Kakariko Village! And even if you do, you'll never find the legendary blade hidden in Shadow Temple!
locations: Shadow Temple Spike Walls Left Chest

Ganondorf Joke.message: After what you did to Koholint Island, how can you call me the bad guy?

Sheik in Ganons Castle Hint.message: I overheard Ganondorf say that he misplaced the Light Arrows in Kakariko Village.

Dampe's Diary Hint.message:
Whoever reads this, please enter Deku Tree. I will let you have my stretching, shrinking keepsake. I'm waiting for you.
--Dampé

ToT Altar as Child.message:
3 Spiritual Stones found in Hyrule... Spirit Temple... Dodongo's Cavern... Goron City... Ye who may become a Hero...
Offer the spiritual stones and
play the Song of Time.
locations: Spirit Temple Child Climb East Chest

ToT Altar as Adult.message:
An awakening voice from the Sacred Realm will call those destined to be Sages, who dwell in the five temples. the Graveyard... Deku Tree... Death Mountain Trail... Lon Lon Ranch... Gerudo Training Ground... Dodongo's Cavern... The awakened ones will await for the Hero to collect 7 Spiritual Stones and Medallions. And the evil one's key will be hidden somewhere
in Hyrule. Together with the Hero of Time, the awakened ones will return the light of peace to the world...
locations: Deku Tree Slingshot Room Side Chest
Gerudo Training Ground Maze Right Central Chest
Dodongos Cavern Bomb Flower Platform Chest

messages: Did you feel the surge of magic recently? A mysterious bird told me it came from Desert Colossus. You should check that place out, @!
Did you feel the surge of magic recently? A mysterious bird told me it came from Desert Colossus. You should check that place out, @!
